title: [CI:DOCS] Fix formatting of podman-build man page
body:
An apostrophe as the first character of the line is a formatting request
in troff, so the words "'Containerfile' or 'Dockerfile'" are not
visible when viewing 'man podman-build'.

Signed-off-by: Jonathan Wakely <jwakely@redhat.com>

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *jwakely*, *mheon* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [mheon] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

WOW, nice find and fix @jwakely TYVM!
LGTM
@TomSweeneyRedHat it was a bit of a head scratcher but simple to fix once I realised what was going on! 😃
